Package org.eventb.ui.tests.utils

Class EventBUITest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.tests.utils.EventBUITest
Direct Known Subclasses:
EventBProjectValidatorTest, OperationTest, PrefixComputerTests, ProofPurgerTests, TestAttributeManipulation, TestEditorManager, TestEventBEditorUtils, TestEventBUtils, TestImageProvider, TestUIRenaming, TestUIUtils
public abstract class EventBUITest extends Object

  • Constructor Details

    • EventBUITest

      public EventBUITest()

  • Method Details

    • createContext

      protected IContextRoot createContext(String bareName) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a context with the given bare name. The context is created as a child of the test Rodin project (rodinProject).
      Parameters:
      bareName - the bare name (without the extension .ctx) of the context
      Returns:
      the newly created context.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createMachine

      protected IMachineRoot createMachine(String bareName) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a machine with the given bare name. The machine is created as a child of the test Rodin project (rodinProject).
      Parameters:
      bareName - the bare name (without the extension .mch) of the machine
      Returns:
      the newly created machine.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createRefinesMachineClause

      protected IRefinesMachine createRefinesMachineClause(IMachineRoot machine, String abstractMachineName) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a new refines machine clause for a machine.
      Parameters:
      machine - the input machine IMachineRoot.
      abstractMachineName - the name of the abstract machine.
      Returns:
      the newly created refines machine clause
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createSeesContextClause

      protected ISeesContext createSeesContextClause(IMachineRoot machine, String contextName) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a new sees context clause for a machine.
      Parameters:
      machine - the input machine IMachineRoot.
      contextName - the name of the context.
      Returns:
      the newly created sees context clause
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createExtendsContextClause

      protected IExtendsContext createExtendsContextClause(IContextRoot context, String contextName) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a new extends context clause for a context.
      Parameters:
      context - the input context IMachineRoot.
      contextName - the name of the extended context.
      Returns:
      the newly created extends context clause
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createEvent

      protected IEvent createEvent(IMachineRoot machine, String eventLabel) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create a new event which belong to a machine with the given label. The new event is non-extended.
      Parameters:
      machine - a machine root.
      eventLabel - the label of the new event.
      Returns:
      the newly created event.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createRefinesEventClause

      protected IRefinesEvent createRefinesEventClause(IEvent event, String abstractEventLabel) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method for creating the refines event clause of an event having the abstract event label specified by the input.
      Parameters:
      event - an event.
      abstractEventLabel - the abstract event label.
      Returns:
      the newly created refines event clause.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur.

    • createParameter

      protected IParameter createParameter(IEvent event, String ident) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a parameter of an event.
      Parameters:
      event - an event
      ident - the parameter identifier
      Returns:
      the newly created parameter
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createGuard

      protected IGuard createGuard(IEvent event, String label, String pred) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a guard of an event.
      Parameters:
      event - an event.
      label - the label of the guard
      pred - the predicate of the guard
      Returns:
      the newly created guard
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createWitness

      protected IWitness createWitness(IEvent event, String label, String pred) throws RodinDBException
      Creates a witness of an event.
      Parameters:
      event - an event.
      label - the label of the witness
      pred - the predicate of the witness
      Returns:
      the newly created witness
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createAction

      protected IAction createAction(IEvent event, String label, String assign) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method for creating an action of an event.
      Parameters:
      event - an event
      label - the label of the action
      assign - the assignment of the action
      Returns:
      the newly created action
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createVariant

      protected IVariant createVariant(IMachineRoot mch, String expression) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method for creating a variant of a machine.
      Parameters:
      mch - a machine root
      expression - the expression of the variant
      Returns:
      the newly created variant
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createInvariant

      protected IInvariant createInvariant(IMachineRoot mch, String label, String predicate, boolean theorem) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method for creating an invariant of a machine.
      Parameters:
      mch - a machine root
      label - the label of the invariant
      predicate - the predicate of the invariant
      theorem - true if the invariant is a theorem
      Returns:
      the newly created invariant
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occurs

    • createAxiom

      protected IAxiom createAxiom(IContextRoot ctx, String label, String predicate, boolean theorem) throws RodinDBException
      Utility method to create an axiom of a context.
      Parameters:
      ctx - a context root
      label - the label of the axiom
      predicate - the predicate of the axiom
      theorem - true iff the axiom is a theorem
      Returns:
      the newly created axiom
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some problems occur

    • setUp

      public void setUp() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • createRodinProject

      protected IRodinProject createRodinProject(String name) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • tearDown

      public void tearDown() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • openEditor

      protected IEventBEditor<?> openEditor(IEventBRoot component) throws org.eclipse.ui.PartInitException
      Open the an Event-B Editor (IEventBEditor) for a given component. Assuming that the component is either a machine (IMachineRoot) or a context (IContextRoot).
      Parameters:
      component - the input component
      Returns:
      the Event-B Editor for the input component.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.ui.PartInitException - if some problems occur when open the editor.

    • createInternalElement

      protected <T extends IInternalElement> T createInternalElement(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> childType) throws RodinDBException
      Method to create an internal element
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of internal element to create
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of the element to create
      childType - the type of the child to create
      Returns:
      the created element
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • createNAxioms

      protected void createNAxioms(IInternalElement parent, String elementAttributePrefix, long n, long beginIndex) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • createNEvents

      protected void createNEvents(IMachineRoot machine, String eventLabelPrefix, long n, long beginIndex) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getMachineRoot

      protected IMachineRoot getMachineRoot(String name)
      Utility method to get a handle to a machine root with the given name. The machine is located in the test Rodin project (rodinProject).
      Parameters:
      name - the bare name (without any file extension) of the machine
      Returns:
      a handle to a machine root with the given name

    • getContextRoot

      protected IContextRoot getContextRoot(String name)
      Utility method to get a handle to a context root with the given name. The context is located in the test Rodin project (rodinProject).
      Parameters:
      name - the bare name (without any file extension) of the context
      Returns:
      a handle to a context root with the given name
